auth.label: API Key
auth.description: NeverBounce API key passed with the key query or form parameter. Create a Custom Integration App to get one: https://developers.neverbounce.com/docs/api-getting-started.

actions.name: create_job
actions.description: Create a NeverBounce bulk verification job from a remote file or supplied rows.

input_location.description: The bulk input is a remote URL.

input.description: The remote URL to the CSV file.

auto_parse.description: Whether NeverBounce should parse the job immediately.

auto_start.description: Whether NeverBounce should start verification immediately after parsing.

run_sample.description: Whether NeverBounce should run the job as a sample.

filename.description: The display filename shown for the job.

leverage_historical_data.description: Whether to leverage historical data during verification.

request_meta_data.description: Additional metadata that influences verification behavior.

allow_manual_review.description: Whether the job is allowed to enter manual review.

callback_url.description: The optional callback URL for job lifecycle events.

callback_headers.description: Optional headers appended to callback requests.

oneOf.description: Create a NeverBounce job from a remote CSV URL.

input_location.description: The bulk input is supplied inline.

additionalProperties.description: One primitive cell value supplied to NeverBounce.

items.description: One supplied input row as a flat object.

auto_parse.description: Whether NeverBounce should parse the job immediately.

auto_start.description: Whether NeverBounce should start verification immediately after parsing.

run_sample.description: Whether NeverBounce should run the job as a sample.

filename.description: The display filename shown for the job.

leverage_historical_data.description: Whether to leverage historical data during verification.

request_meta_data.description: Additional metadata that influences verification behavior.

allow_manual_review.description: Whether the job is allowed to enter manual review.

callback_url.description: The optional callback URL for job lifecycle events.

callback_headers.description: Optional headers appended to callback requests.

oneOf.description: Create a NeverBounce job from supplied rows.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for creating a NeverBounce bulk verification job.

status.description: The request status returned by NeverBounce.

job_id.description: The NeverBounce job identifier returned by the jobs API.

execution_time.description: The server execution time in milliseconds.

outputSchema.description: The response returned after NeverBounce creates a bulk job.

actions.name: download_job_results
actions.description: Download a NeverBounce bulk job as CSV with optional result filters and extra columns.

job_id.description: The NeverBounce job identifier returned by the jobs API.

valids.description: Whether valid email results should be included.

invalids.description: Whether invalid email results should be included.

catchalls.description: Whether catchall email results should be included.

unknowns.description: Whether unknown email results should be included.

disposables.description: Whether disposable email results should be included.

include_duplicates.description: Whether duplicate rows should be included.

only_duplicates.description: Whether only duplicate rows should be returned.

only_bad_syntax.description: Whether only bad-syntax rows should be returned.

email_status.description: Whether the CSV should include the email_status column.

email_status_int.description: Whether the CSV should include the integer email_status column.

has_dns_info.description: Whether the CSV should include has_dns_info.

has_mail_server.description: Whether the CSV should include has_mail_server.

mail_server_reachable.description: Whether the CSV should include mail_server_reachable.

free_email_host.description: Whether the CSV should include free_email_host.

role_account.description: Whether the CSV should include role_account.

addr.description: Whether the CSV should include addr.

alias.description: Whether the CSV should include alias.

host.description: Whether the CSV should include host.

fqdn.description: Whether the CSV should include fqdn.

subdomain.description: Whether the CSV should include subdomain.

domain.description: Whether the CSV should include domain.

tld.description: Whether the CSV should include tld.

network.description: Whether the CSV should include network.

bad_syntax.description: Whether the CSV should include bad_syntax.

binary_operators_type.description: The representation used for binary flags.

line_feed_type.description: The line feed style used in the downloaded CSV.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for downloading NeverBounce job results as CSV.

filename.description: The filename inferred from the NeverBounce response.

csv.description: The raw CSV body returned by NeverBounce.

outputSchema.description: The normalized CSV download returned by NeverBounce.

actions.name: get_account_info
actions.description: Get the current NeverBounce account credit summary and bulk job counters.

inputSchema.description: This action does not require any input.

status.description: The request status returned by NeverBounce.

credits_info.description: The credit summary returned by NeverBounce.

completed.description: The number of completed bulk jobs.

under_review.description: The number of jobs currently under manual review.

queued.description: The number of jobs currently queued.

processing.description: The number of jobs currently processing.

job_counts.description: The job counters returned by the account info endpoint.

execution_time.description: The server execution time in milliseconds.

actions.name: get_job_results
actions.description: Retrieve paginated NeverBounce verification results for a completed bulk job.

job_id.description: The NeverBounce job identifier returned by the jobs API.

items_per_page.description: The number of results per page.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for retrieving paginated NeverBounce job results.

status.description: The request status returned by NeverBounce.

total_results.description: The total number of matching result rows.

total_pages.description: The total number of result pages.

query.description: The query echo returned by NeverBounce.

data.description: The original row data submitted for this result.

verification.description: The verification object returned for the result row.

items.description: One row returned by the NeverBounce job results endpoint.

execution_time.description: The server execution time in milliseconds.

outputSchema.description: The NeverBounce paginated job results response.

actions.name: get_job_status
actions.description: Retrieve the current processing status and aggregate counts for a NeverBounce job.

job_id.description: The NeverBounce job identifier returned by the jobs API.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for retrieving a NeverBounce job status.

status.description: The request status returned by NeverBounce.

id.description: The NeverBounce job identifier returned by the jobs API.

filename.description: The filename shown for the job.

created_at.description: The timestamp when the job was created.

records.description: The total number of submitted records.

valid.description: The number of valid email results.

invalid.description: The number of invalid email results.

catchall.description: The number of catchall email results.

disposable.description: The number of disposable email results.

unknown.description: The number of unknown email results.

bad_syntax.description: Rows rejected for bad email syntax.

total.description: The aggregate counters returned by NeverBounce for a bulk job.

percent_complete.description: The percent completion reported by NeverBounce.

job_status.description: The current NeverBounce bulk job status.

execution_time.description: The server execution time in milliseconds.

outputSchema.description: The NeverBounce bulk job status response.

actions.name: parse_job
actions.description: Parse a NeverBounce bulk job created without auto_parse enabled.

job_id.description: The NeverBounce job identifier returned by the jobs API.

auto_start.description: Whether NeverBounce should start verification after parsing.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for parsing a NeverBounce bulk job.

status.description: The request status returned by NeverBounce.

queue_id.description: The queue identifier returned when the parse request succeeds.

execution_time.description: The server execution time in milliseconds.

outputSchema.description: The response returned after NeverBounce parses a bulk job.

actions.name: single_check
actions.description: Verify a single email address with NeverBounce and return the verification result.

address_info.description: Whether to include the optional address_info object.

credits_info.description: Whether to include current credit counters.

timeout.description: The maximum verification time in seconds.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for verifying a single email with NeverBounce.

status.description: The request status returned by NeverBounce.

suggested_correction.description: The typo correction suggested by NeverBounce when applicable.

original_email.description: The original email address submitted to NeverBounce.

normalized_email.description: The normalized email address returned by NeverBounce.

addr.description: The local part of the email address.

alias.description: The alias part detected in the email address.

host.description: The full host portion of the email address.

subdomain.description: The subdomain portion of the email address.

address_info.description: The optional address_info object returned by NeverBounce.

credits_info.description: The credit summary returned by NeverBounce.

execution_time.description: The server execution time in milliseconds.

actions.name: start_job
actions.description: Start a parsed NeverBounce bulk job.

job_id.description: The NeverBounce job identifier returned by the jobs API.

run_sample.description: Whether NeverBounce should run the job as a sample.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for starting a parsed NeverBounce bulk job.

status.description: The request status returned by NeverBounce.

queue_id.description: The queue identifier returned when the start request succeeds.

message.description: An optional message returned by NeverBounce.

execution_time.description: The server execution time in milliseconds.

outputSchema.description: The response returned after NeverBounce starts a bulk job.
